# Evolve Sprouts — Full AI Context

> Evolve Sprouts is a Montessori-informed family support and auntie training
> service for families with children aged 0-6 in Hong Kong. Founded by Ida
> De Gregorio, a Montessori-certified practitioner and mother of two, Evolve
> Sprouts trains domestic helpers ("aunties") to become Montessori-guided child
> development partners using practical routines, gentle discipline, and
> child-led strategies adapted for Hong Kong homes.

---

## About Evolve Sprouts

### The Founder: Ida De Gregorio

Ida De Gregorio is the founder of Evolve Sprouts, a Montessori-certified
practitioner and mother of two (Mia, 5, and Eva). She started her career in
media and communication, working in hospitality across the UK and Hong Kong.
Four years ago, she left her corporate role to pursue her passion for
reimagining education. Her Montessori journey began at home as a parent,
witnessing how respect, independence, and child-led learning transformed both
her children's growth and her own.

### Mission

Evolve Sprouts exists because doing things differently is hard — especially in
Hong Kong's fast pace. It is a community for parents navigating Montessori
principles at home, offering training for aunties, practical tools, emotional
support, and shared learning from families walking the same path.

### Core Pillars

1. **Training Course for Your Auntie**: Ensure children grow up with family
   values by training helpers with a specialised course.
2. **Practical Tools**: Small-space Montessori setups, real-life scripts for
   difficult moments, and clear actions to apply immediately.
3. **Emotional Support**: A safe, non-judgmental space to share struggles, ask
   questions, and feel seen.
4. **Shared Learning**: Stories and strategies from families walking the same
   path.

---

## My Best Auntie Training Course

### Overview

A 6-hour interactive Montessori training course for domestic helpers, designed
to transform aunties into Montessori-guided child development partners. The
course is split across 3 weekly in-person sessions of 2 hours each at Goldwin
Heights, 2 Seymour Road, Mid-Levels, Hong Kong.

### Course Structure

- **Week 1-3 (Transform Your Home)**: Fewer battles, more independent play.
  A home that fosters the child's natural curiosity.
- **Week 4-6 (Gentle Guidance & Clear Boundaries)**: Mealtime battles end.
  Bedtime becomes peaceful. The helper learns to guide with calm consistency.
- **Week 7-9 (Fostering Independence)**: Building concentration, order, and
  self-reliance that every Hong Kong classroom demands.

### What Is Included

- **Live Practice Training**: Interactive sessions where aunties role-play
  common toddler moments and practice calm, Montessori-aligned responses.
- **Post-Course Auntie Review**: A structured follow-up to refine techniques,
  troubleshoot friction points, and reinforce consistency.
- **Family Routine Workbook**: Ready-to-use checklists, scripts, and routine
  templates for daily caregiving.
- **Home Setup Walkthrough**: A practical guide to prepare clear play, sleep,
  and transition spaces for better flow.
- **Communication Scripts Toolkit**: Simple scripts for transitions,
  boundaries, and emotional coaching.
- **Confidence Booster Coaching**: Focused coaching touchpoints to keep
  implementation on track.

### Age Groups

Separate cohorts for:
- **Ages 0-1** (infants)
- **Ages 1-3** (toddlers)
- **Ages 3-6** (preschool)

### Pricing

- HKD 9,000 per participant
- Full refund up to 7 days prior
- Payment via FPS QR

### Course Highlights: Why Families Choose This Course

- **Calm Is Built, Not Hoped For**: Chaos comes from unclear guidance and
  inconsistent adults. Aunties are trained to build calm through structure,
  limits, and preparation.
- **Your Auntie Is a Daily Educator**: Whether trained or not, the auntie
  shapes the child every day. The course ensures she models independence,
  respect, and emotional regulation.
- **We Work Where Problems Actually Happen**: Courses fail when theoretical.
  Evolve Sprouts observes the child in the home during real routines and
  intervenes with precision.
- **Progress Must Be Visible**: Families see measurable shifts in behavior,
  routines, and atmosphere — tracked weekly and reviewed together.
- **Alignment Is Non-Negotiable**: When parents and aunties are misaligned,
  children suffer. Both are worked with so guidance is consistent, fair, and
  predictable.

---

## Other Services

- **Consultation sessions**: Personalised family support and guidance.
- **Home setup guidance**: Practical Montessori-adapted space setup for small
  Hong Kong apartments.
- **Parent support**: Ongoing coaching and resources for families.
- **Free resources**: Downloadable guides on gentle parenting, including
  "4 Simple Ways to Teach Patience to Young Children."
- **Community newsletter**: Monthly Sprouts Squad newsletter.
- **Workshops and events**: Montessori-based training events for helpers and
  parents (see events page for schedule).

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General Questions

**Q: We live in a small apartment. Will this still work?**
A: Yes. Most Hong Kong families do. Evolve Sprouts specialises in small-space
Montessori setups, shared rooms, and practical routines that do not require
expensive materials or furniture.

**Q: Do I need to follow Montessori perfectly to work with you?**
A: No. This is Montessori-informed, not Montessori-dogmatic. The focus is on
principles that improve daily life: independence, respect, consistency, and
emotional regulation — adapted to modern Hong Kong homes.

**Q: Who is Evolve Sprouts for?**
A: Evolve Sprouts supports families in Hong Kong with children aged 0-6,
especially those working with helpers or navigating busy city life.

**Q: How is Montessori relevant for infants and toddlers at home?**
A: Montessori is not just for classrooms. Aunties are taught to create
child-friendly home environments and practical routines that build
independence from infancy.

**Q: Are these strategies culturally appropriate for Hong Kong families?**
A: Yes. Montessori principles are adapted to local lifestyles, including small
homes, busy schedules, and helper-supported caregiving.

### Montessori Discipline

**Q: Will this make my child too soft or less competitive?**
A: Children raised with independence, emotional regulation, and responsibility
often become more confident, focused, and resilient — not less capable.

**Q: My child has tantrums, hits, or refuses to listen. Can Montessori help?**
A: Yes, but not with quick fixes. Environment, adult responses, routines, and
developmental expectations are reviewed, then practical steps are given that
can be applied consistently.

**Q: Does Montessori mean no discipline or letting children do anything?**
A: No. Montessori discipline means clear limits, consistent routines, and calm
leadership. Children thrive when freedom is paired with structure.

**Q: What is the difference between positive discipline and regular discipline?**
A: Traditional discipline often relies on rewards and punishments. Positive
discipline focuses on understanding behaviour, setting clear boundaries, and
coaching children toward self-regulation.

### Support & Resources

**Q: Will I get practical tools or just theory?**
A: Practical tools are provided, including routines, behaviour scripts,
environment checklists, and reflection sheets. Principles are always turned
into action.

**Q: What if parents and helpers disagree on discipline?**
A: This is very common. Adults are aligned first so children receive consistent
messages, expectations, and routines.

**Q: My helper does not speak English fluently. Is that a problem?**
A: No. The method uses clear language, repetition, demonstrations, and visual
guidance. The goal is understanding and consistency.

**Q: Do you work directly with helpers?**
A: Yes. Helper-friendly coaching, practical scripts, and routines aligned with
family values are provided.

### Packages & Pricing

**Q: What services do you offer?**
A: Consultation sessions, auntie training, home setup guidance, and parent
support services tailored for families in Hong Kong.

**Q: Do you offer packages or bundles?**
A: Yes. Some families choose bundled support for deeper change. Options are
recommended after understanding the family's needs.

**Q: Why is this priced higher than a one-off parenting talk?**
A: Because it is personalised and implementation-focused. Families pay for
real-life observation, tailored guidance, and ongoing support — not just
motivation.

**Q: Is this just a one-time session or ongoing support?**
A: Both options are available. Some families need a reset plan, while others
benefit from longer support as children grow.

### Trust & Guarantees

**Q: Do you guarantee results?**
A: Children are not machines, so no ethical professional guarantees instant
perfection. What is guaranteed is clear guidance, practical strategy, and
honest support.

**Q: Is this backed by evidence?**
A: The work is informed by Montessori principles, child development research,
and years of practical application with Hong Kong families and helpers.

**Q: What makes Evolve Sprouts different from other parenting coaches?**
A: Evolve Sprouts combines Montessori-informed guidance with deep
understanding of Hong Kong family-helper dynamics. The approach is practical,
respectful, and non-judgmental.

### Enrolment

**Q: Is this suitable for international families in Hong Kong?**
A: Yes. Multicultural families navigating different expectations around
discipline, education, and caregiving are regularly supported.

**Q: What if I am not sure which service I need?**
A: That is normal. Reach out and the best starting point will be recommended
with no pressure.

**Q: How do I get started?**
A: Start with a consultation or contact Evolve Sprouts directly. The most
suitable service for the family will be recommended.

---

## Testimonials

- "Ida was fantastic, she helped me understand how I could set up my home in a
  Montessori way without disrupting my style." — Mary Lo, Mom of 2

- "Taking part in the toddler healthy eating course was such a rewarding
  experience! Ida's passion for child development truly shone through, and her
  expertise in Montessori principles made the strategies practical and easy to
  implement." — Yen, Mom of 1

- "My aunties came back very excited and motivated! I'm already seeing more
  awareness of the language Lizel is using as well as approach to toddler
  outbursts." — Gabriella, Mum of 3

- "My auntie recently completed your pilot programme for 0-12 month! Thank you
  so much for this wonderful course. It's given her lots of fantastic ideas
  which we've been implementing!" — Emma, Mum of 1

- "My auntie attended the course and came back with real life understanding of
  how to raise an independent calm toddler. There is no other place for
  helpers to connect and ask questions about how to raise children and
  communicate with their employers." — Mira, Mum of 1

---

## Contact Information

- **Email**: ida@evolvesprouts.com
- **WhatsApp**: Available via website contact button
- **Website**: https://www.evolvesprouts.com
- **Response time**: 24-48 hours
- **Location**: Goldwin Heights, 2 Seymour Road, Mid-Levels, Hong Kong
- **Area served**: Hong Kong

---

## What Evolve Sprouts Does Not Do

- Does not provide childcare or nanny placement services.
- Does not offer online-only training courses (training is in-person in Hong Kong).
- Is not a Montessori school or daycare facility.
- Does not guarantee specific child behavior outcomes.
